mentions.note: Brand-name company with network effects; long-term value compelling; included in book recommendation list.
Another brand company from last 6-7 years that Cramer really likes; fits pattern of consumer-facing digital monopolies with strong network effects.

Online marketplace down 34% Q1 on AI network-effect displacement fears; Cramer disagrees—once user base exists, hard to topple marketplaces. Now cheapest ever. Stock can be bought here; likes the value.
Caller Minnie down 30%, unsure if 'own it don't trade it'. Cramer says buy—but market is rotating away from software to hardware. DoorDash suffering not on fundamentals but on sector preference.
Market leader with best-in-class management under Tony Xu; currently sells at premium 32x earnings; wait for pullback to $100-120 despite record order volume.
